result.stdout:
Description:
  🐨 Koalesce CLI for OpenAPI

Usage:
  Koalesce.OpenAPI.CLI [options]

Options:
  --output <output>  Path to write the merged OpenAPI spec (e.g. apigateway.yaml)
  --config <config>  Path to the Koalesce configuration file (default: appsettings.json) [default: appsettings.json]
  --verbose          Enable verbose logging (show Information level logs)
  --version          Show version information
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information

  --version          Show version information
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information
